prompt: Our team has been validating a fullstack app. Last week's benchmark was 92/100 (Grade: A). This week it's 76/100 (Grade: C). The breakdown: Coverage 70 (was 95), Evidence Quality 60 (was 100), others stable. What happened? Why did our score drop so much?
expected_output: Coverage and Evidence Quality both dropped. Likely causes: journey subdirectories deleted, new evidence files are empty placeholders, validation not re-run, verdict report missing (loses +30 bonus). Action: re-run validation, delete empty files, regenerate verdict. Expected recovery: 92+ (Grade A).
assertions: Identifies Coverage as one of the two dimensions that dropped (from 95 to 70)
Identifies Evidence Quality as the other dropped dimension (from 100 to 60)
Provides at least 2 plausible causes for the Coverage drop (e.g. journey subdirs deleted, evidence purged, new features without new journeys)
Provides at least 2 plausible causes for the Evidence Quality drop (e.g. empty/junk files, missing verdict file, files < 10 bytes)
Recommends inspecting e2e-evidence/ for empty or zero-byte files
Recommends re-running validation to regenerate fresh evidence with all original journeys
Mentions the verdict / report.md file and the +30 bonus it unlocks on Evidence Quality
Projects recovery to Grade A (aggregate ≥ 90) after the recommended remediation
